category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Qatar) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Qatar Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入卡塔尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入卡塔爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Qatar requirements: QGOSM/GSO conformity and registration, GSO IEC 62133 cell safety, GSO EMC and CRA wireless type approval, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer obligation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与卡塔尔要求对照：QGOSM/GSO合格评定与注册、GSO IEC 62133电芯安全、GSO电磁兼容及CRA无线型号核准、UN 38.3运输，以及本地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與卡塔爾要求對照：QGOSM/GSO合格評定與登記、GSO IEC 62133電芯安全、GSO電磁兼容及CRA無線型號核准、UN 38.3運輸，以及本地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Qatar must meet GSO/IEC 62133 cell safety, obtain QGOSM/GSO conformity and registration for products in regulated scope, secure CRA type approval for any wireless functions, hold a valid UN 38.3 transport report, and ship through an in-country Qatari importer — none of which is satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口卡塔尔，须满足GSO/IEC 62133电芯安全，对受监管产品取得QGOSM/GSO合格评定与注册，对任何无线功能取得CRA型号核准，持有有效的UN 38.3运输报告，并通过卡塔尔本地进口商出货——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口卡塔爾，須滿足GSO/IEC 62133電芯安全，對受監管產品取得QGOSM/GSO合格評定與登記，對任何無線功能取得CRA型號核准，持有有效的UN 38.3運輸報告，並通過卡塔爾本地進口商出貨——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
